name: Red Chili Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Open each dried red chili pod. Wash the pods well inside and out, removing any blemishes. Remove stems, seeds, and veins from the pods (leave some veins for extra heat). Rinse with cold water.
2. Soak the chili pods in hot water for one hour or until soft.
3. Transfer the soaked chilies to an electric blender or food processor. Add enough hot water to almost cover the chilies, leaving about two inches of headspace.
4. Blend on high until smooth and skins disappear, approximately 2-3 minutes. If the sauce is too thick, add more water and blend for another minute or until the skins are no longer visible.
5. Add the garlic cloves and process until well blended.
6. Salt to taste.
